'''Meirana''' was a [[Tarasin]] female, the sister of [[Dariana]] and [[Liriana]].

==Biography==
Slightly older and more capable than Dariana, she served as Irstat-Kes of the [[Hiironi irstat]] for years. When the Mother of the Hiironi was killed by a [[kilassin]], Meirana was ready to move on to that position, but she was struck down by a strange disease within a day. The other adepts of the irstat said she had been called to be one with the [[Cularin/Legends|world]]. Following the succession line, a reluctant Dariana succeeded Meirana as Mother

==Behind the scenes==
This character name is alternatively spelled ''Meirana'' or ''Meiriana'' even in the same paragraph.
